message:
Add robot ru_sync pure function branch tests

Tests for previously uncovered branches:
- parseStringSlice: all type cases (66.7% → 100%)
- appendUniqueStrings: dedup and empty handling (76.9% → 100%)
- stringValue: all type cases (75% → 100%)
- firstNonEmpty: all branches (75% → 100%)
- countJSONArray: all cases (66.7% → 100%)
- agentTypeFromProgram: all agent types (44.4% → 100%)

Coverage: internal/robot 46.4% → 46.5%
